rationale: For a Portuguese resident, continued oil price declines from the US-Iran deal announcement provide mild relief on fuel and energy costs — no other headline has meaningful direct impact on Portugal this cycle.

top_events.title: Oil prices slide after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Falling oil prices modestly reduce fuel and energy costs for Portuguese households and businesses — continuation of last cycle's trend with no new qualitative leap.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama, Málaga) is a minor regional safety note — no direct impact on Portugal but relevant to Iberian tourism sector.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan investment deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal but reflects broader Western economic activity — background noise.
